steps.title: Recognize 42 as the y-intercept
steps.content: The function $f(x) = 42 - 0.16x$ can be written as $f(x) = -0.16x + 42$, which shows 42 is the constant term. In any linear function, this constant is the y-intercept - the value when $x = 0$. So $b = 42$.

steps.title: Evaluate at the start of the experiment
steps.content:
Since $x$ represents days after the start, $x = 0$ is the start of the experiment. Evaluating there:
$$f(0) = 42 - 0.16(0) = 42$$
The water height at the start is 42 cm. That confirms A is correct.
